VanEck Lowers Fees For Three ETFs

VanEck Launches Digital India ETF to Access Next Wave of Growth

holdings.infoBox: DGIN is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bharti Airtel stock at 7.38%, Eternal at 7.15%, Reliance Industries Ltd GDR - 144A at 6.85%, Vodafone Idea at 6.28%, and Jio Financial Services at 5.91%.

overview.description: The VanEck Digital India ETF (DGIN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Digital India index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of Indian companies that are involved in the digitalization of India's economy. DGIN was launched on Feb 15, 2022 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: Why the Iran War is Hitting Indian Stocks Harder Than Other Markets
data.text: Record foreign outflows and surging energy costs are battering India's economy and the rupee. While geopolitical tensions drive crude prices higher, some sectors show resilience amid the volatility.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Lowers Fees For Three ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announces that, effective today June 20th, three of its Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) will have lower management fees.

data.title: VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Launches Digital India ETF to Access Next Wave of Growth
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck has launched the VanEck Digital India ETF (DGIN), offering targeted exposure to leading companies involved in, supporting India's digitization
